state_snapshot.overall_goal: Integrate openNURBS 8.x into Alice Viewer 2 as a vcpkg-managed dependency for DOD-optimized .3dm mesh translation.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - Compiler: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, C++17. - Runtime: Strictly static MSVC runtime (`/MT`). - Style: Strict Allman formatting. - Performance: Zero heap allocations in hot loops (using `Alice::LinearArena`). - Architecture: STB-style single-header for `RhinoIO` with a "Quarantine Boundary" (implementation guarded by `ALICE_RHINO_IMPLEMENTATION` to prevent `opennurbs.h` leakage). - Lifecycle: Global openNURBS state managed via `ON::Begin()` and `ON::End()`.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - openNURBS 8.x Port: Version `8.24.25281.15003`, Archive Hash: `E115F27ABC40861A00EF445C65D9A7EC8B6E7772742C30A31BF7F0D4AC54B557C4B58B84BFE13592BE46B64711E1CA3AC016A61FD32A31EF6135702FCFD51D2C`. - Registry: Managed via local git-registry in `vcpkg-overlay-ports/` and mapped in `vcpkg-configuration.json`. - Dependency Linkage: Requires explicit linking of `shlwapi.lib` and `zlib.lib` for static builds (injected via custom `opennurbsConfig.cmake` in port). - Missing Headers: Portfile manually copies all `*.h` (including `opennurbs_windows_targetver.h`) to the include root to fix installation gaps. - API Discovery: `ONX_Model` and `ONX_ModelComponentIterator` used for mesh extraction; `geometry->Geometry(nullptr)` cast to `ON_Mesh`.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/RhinoIO.h`: Single-header refactor completed. Separates POD interface from openNURBS-dependent implementation. - `src/RhinoIO.cpp`: Deleted. Logic migrated to `RhinoIO.h`. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Updated switchboard to include `#define ALICE_RHINO_IMPLEMENTATION` and global lifecycle calls (`ON::Begin/End`). - `CMakeLists.txt`: Updated `add_executable` to remove `src/RhinoIO.cpp`. - `build_env_config.json`: Cached LLVM/Ninja paths verified and used for compilation.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b\Documents\REPOS\alice-viewer - openNurbs` - Binary: `build/bin/AliceViewer.exe` (Successfully relinked). - Dependency Root: `vcpkg_installed/x64-windows-static/`. - Source: `src/main.cpp`, `src/AliceViewer.cpp`, `src/sketch.cpp`.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Refactored RhinoIO into an STB-style single-header. - Verified the "Quarantine Boundary" works (build succeeds without global opennurbs.h pollution). - Executed `AliceViewer.exe` test; confirmed `RHINO_IO_TEST` executes correctly (failed on missing `test.3dm` as expected). - Removed legacy `.cpp` file and updated CMake.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Setup vcpkg git registry for openNURBS 8.x. 2. [DONE] Resolve header installation and static linkage errors. 3. [DONE] Implement ONX_Model mesh translation. 4. [DONE] Refactor to STB-style single-header architecture. 5. [IN PROGRESS] Verify mesh extraction with a valid .3dm file. <-- IMMEDIATE NEXT STEP 6. [TODO] Add support for Curve (ON_Curve) and Point (ON_PointCloud) translation to POD buffers.
